title: Love Hina Christmas Special: Silent Eve
overview: As another round of preliminary tests approach for Keitaro, so does Christmas. And as the first Christmas of the millennium, there is a rumor that if one confesses his love on this special eve it will come true. Keitaro has decided what he needs to do on this Christmas eve. But being a re-taker, can he afford taking attention away from the tests on the same day?
